install_method: cloned repo + editable install (scripts/train.py + configs/ + envs/ live in the repo, not the wheel)
install_location: C:\tmp\skillopt-feasibility\upstream (scratch, gitignored — NOT committed into the repo)
install_commands: uv pip install datasets   # for benchmark materialization
windows_notes: openai_compatible backend initializes against local Ollama (http://localhost:11434/v1) with a dummy key — no external egress, no provider key.

REQUIRES PYTHONUTF8=1 (or PYTHONIOENCODING=utf-8): the optimizer prints non-cp1252 characters (e.g. U+2192 '->') that crash the default Windows console codec mid-run (UnicodeEncodeError). This is a Windows-console issue, not a logic fault.

Bundled data/*_id_split/ dirs are LOOKUP MANIFESTS (IDs only), not runnable payloads — each benchmark must be materialized from its HF source first. SearchQA has scripts/materialize_searchqa.py; others need per-benchmark materialization.

local_wiring.base_url: http://localhost:11434/v1 (Ollama, direct — LiteLLM->Ollama path is buggy per repo memory)

not_committed: The cloned upstream repo + its .venv (scratch, gitignored).
Materialized benchmark data (downloaded from HF; not redistributed).
outputs/ run artifacts (raw logs excerpted into raw/ for provenance only).
